center.name: 阿德爾伯特山脈
center.summary: 阿德爾伯特山脈是巴布亞新幾內亞的山脈，位於該國中北部，由馬當省負責管轄，最高點海拔高度1,716米，該山脈是超過700種鳥類的棲息地。

birds.evidence: The fire-maned bowerbird (Sericulus bakeri) is a medium-sized, approximately long, bowerbird that inhabits and endemic to the forests of the Adelbert Range in Papua New Guinea.{{cite journal |last1=Diamond |first1=Jared |last2=Bishop |first2=K
